Class AbstractJasperExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
JasperIExporter, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractJasperExcelExporter, JasperCsvExporter, JasperDocxExporter, JasperHtmlExporter, JasperImageExporter, JasperJsonExporter, JasperOdtExporter, JasperPdfExporter, JasperPptxExporter, JasperRtfExporter, JasperTextExporter, JasperXmlExporter
public abstract class AbstractJasperExporter extends Object implements JasperIExporter

Abstract AbstractJasperExporter class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
See Also:
